title: Refactor DIP-024 (DIP): Abstract base class hard-codes dependency on concrete PrettyPrinter
apply_error: no patch blocks produced by LLM

detected_issue.description: Abstract base class hard-codes dependency on concrete PrettyPrinter
detected_issue.reasoning: The abstract class GeneratorBase directly instantiates DefaultPrettyPrinter (L378). Abstractions should not depend on details; hard-coding a specific implementation of an interface in a base class prevents users from easily substituting different defaults.

fix_logic.summary: Remove hard-coded dependency on DefaultPrettyPrinter in GeneratorBase
fix_logic.rationale: The Dependency Inversion Principle is violated when an abstract class directly instantiates a concrete implementation. By changing _constructDefaultPrettyPrinter to return a new instance of DefaultPrettyPrinter, we keep the existing behavior while allowing subclasses to override this factory method to provide different implementations if needed.
